name: integration_bro_created_a_skill_inspired_by_karpathy
method:
bro created a skill inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch to fine-tune his other Claude Code skills and iteratively make them better. one skill went from 56% → 92% in just 4 rounds of changes.

the meth

phases.name: audit
steps: define 5-point eval rubric per skill category (clarity, specificity, actionability, output quality, edge case handling)
baseline score each skill 0-100 via claude -p

phases.name: refine
steps: re-score after each cycle, stop at 90%+

phases.name: package
steps: bundle top 10 refined skills into DIGITAL_PRODUCTS/ready_to_sell/
generate Gumroad listing copy ($29-47) with before/after score proof
generate 3 tweets showing 56%→92% style case study
